decision_reason: The opt-in whole-cycle gate stayed exact on D32 9/9 and skipped verifier passes, but it reduced acceptance density and raised total cycle wall enough to regress the retained B=1 row from 1.018x prompt mean / 1.009x total-time to 0.859x prompt mean / 0.850x total-time.

workload.policy: if depth-1 MTP top-1 probability proxy < threshold, emit one exact target AR token and realign the proposer instead of running verify_chain

commands.b3_quicksort_thr_0p5: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --confidence-threshold 0.5 --acceptance-diagnostics --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-confidence-gate050-quicksort-smoke-20260613.json
commands.b3_quicksort_thr_0p9: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --confidence-threshold 0.9 --acceptance-diagnostics --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-confidence-gate090-quicksort-smoke-20260613.json
commands.b1_quicksort_thr_0p9: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --confidence-threshold 0.9 --acceptance-diagnostics --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-confidence-gate090-quicksort-smoke-20260613.json
commands.suite_b1_thr_0p9: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 10800 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 1 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --confidence-threshold 0.9 --acceptance-diagnostics --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-confidence-gate090-9prompt-d32-20260613 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-confidence-gate090-9prompt-d32-20260613.json
commands.validation: python3 -m py_compile scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py scripts/mtp_verifier_economics.py scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py; git diff --check

next_action: Do not promote whole-cycle confidence gating for MTP. Continue adaptive work with per-prompt budget selection or max-shape live budget transitions; confidence gating may be revisited only with a better calibrated selector that proves it does not sacrifice accepted tokens.
